source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
The perimeter of the square in the figure is 40 . The perimeter of the larger equilateral triangle in the figure is $a+b \sqrt{p}$, where $p$ is a prime number. What is the value of $7 a+5 b+3 p$ ?
<image1>
